title: CorpseComplex Unofficial
description: An unofficial version of CorpseComplex mod
body:
# Corpse Complex Unoffical
This mod is an unofficial port of the [Corpse Complex](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse-complex) mod for Minecraft high version.  

Don't report the issue for TheIllusiveC4 when you use the mod, you should report us.

Corpse Complex is a mod that adds a variety of configuration options to the Minecraft death system. We have fully ported the original mod's features. Additionally, we have restored the previously removed Grave Scroll item.

## Features
- All configuration options are available through both the config file.
Modules like inventory, experience, hunger, and respawn can be enabled or disabled individually.
- A new Soulbinding enchantment is included to help keep important gear on death.
- Control experience loss, manage hunger on respawn, and apply customizable potion effects like Memento Mori.

More compatibility with other mods will be added in future updates and new features.
